title: Create and register a worktree for PBI-040 investigation
action: From the MAIN checkout, run `node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree new --feature help-fingerprint-repro`. This creates a linked git worktree at ../herdr-gateway--wt--help-fingerprint-repro on branch wt/help-fingerprint-repro and grants it its own .bee store. Do not investigate or fix PBI-040 itself in this cell -- only create and verify the worktree exists and is registered.

truths: git worktree list shows the new herdr-gateway--wt--help-fingerprint-repro entry on branch wt/help-fingerprint-repro
node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json shows a grant for herdr-gateway--wt--help-fingerprint-repro
the MAIN checkout's tracked source files are untouched -- only .bee/ bookkeeping and the new worktree are created
prohibitions: Do not touch src/ or any product file
Do not start investigating or fixing PBI-040 itself -- that happens in a future session inside the new worktree

verify: git worktree list | grep -q 'wt--help-fingerprint-repro' && node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json | grep -q help-fingerprint-repro && echo WORKTREE_OK

trace.outcome: Created and registered worktree herdr-gateway--wt--help-fingerprint-repro on branch wt/help-fingerprint-repro for PBI-040 investigation
trace.verify_command: git worktree list | grep -q 'wt--help-fingerprint-repro' && node .bee/bin/bee.mjs worktree list --json | grep -q help-fingerprint-repro && echo WORKTREE_OK
